leadText: Alluring Voice (Japanese: みわくのボイス Alluring Voice) is a damage-dealing move introduced during Generation IX, in The Indigo Disk. It is TM227 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Alluring Voice inflicts damage. The move also confuses the target if the target's stats were raised during the same turn before the execution of Alluring Voice. Alluring Voice is a sound-based move .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Alluring Voice is the only Fairy-type move introduced in Generation IX to be accessible in regular gameplay.
